description.zh-CN: 输出当前工作目录的完整路径
description.en-US: Print the full path of the current working directory

description.zh-CN: 列出目录中的文件和子目录
description.en-US: List files and subdirectories in a directory

description.zh-CN: 复制文件或目录到目标位置
description.en-US: Copy files or directories to a destination

description.zh-CN: 移动文件到新位置或重命名文件
description.en-US: Move files to a new location or rename them

description.zh-CN: 删除指定的文件或目录

commands.notes: rm -rf 会递归强制删除，不可恢复，使用时务必确认路径正确

description.zh-CN: 创建空文件或更新文件时间戳
description.en-US: Create an empty file or update file timestamps

description.zh-CN: 创建文件的硬链接或符号链接
description.en-US: Create hard or symbolic links to files
Search for files in a directory tree

description.zh-CN: 显示文件的详细元数据信息
description.en-US: Display detailed metadata about a file

description.zh-CN: 解析符号链接并返回绝对路径
description.en-US: Resolve symlinks and return the absolute path

description.zh-CN: 以树状结构显示目录内容
description.en-US: Display directory contents in a tree structure

description.zh-CN: 逐行比较两个文件的差异
统计文件的行数、单词数和字节数
description.en-US: Count lines, words, and bytes in a file

description.zh-CN: 在文件中搜索匹配指定模式的行
description.en-US: Search for lines matching a pattern in files

description.zh-CN: 使用正则表达式对文本进行过滤和转换
description.en-US: Filter and transform text using regular expressions

description.zh-CN: 基于模式匹配的文本扫描和处理语言
description.en-US: Pattern-based text scanning and processing language

description.zh-CN: 从每行中提取指定部分
过滤文件中的相邻重复行
description.en-US: Filter out adjacent duplicate lines from a file

description.zh-CN: 将标准输入转换为命令参数并执行
description.en-US: Convert standard input to arguments and execute a command

description.zh-CN: 对字符进行删除、替换或压缩
将标准输入同时输出到屏幕和文件
description.en-US: Read from standard input and write to both screen and files
Output the first lines of a file

description.zh-CN: 输出文件的最后几行，支持实时跟踪
description.en-US: Output the last lines of a file, with live follow mode

description.zh-CN: 将输入格式化为对齐的列
显示当前运行的进程信息
实时显示系统进程和资源使用情况
description.en-US: Display real-time system processes and resource usage

description.zh-CN: 向指定进程发送信号以终止它
description.en-US: Send a signal to terminate a process

commands.notes: kill -9 (SIGKILL) 会强制终止进程，进程无法捕获该信号，可能导致数据丢失

description.zh-CN: 显示系统中被进程打开的文件信息
description.en-US: List information about files opened by processes

description.zh-CN: 显示文件系统的磁盘空间使用情况
description.en-US: Display disk space usage of file systems

description.zh-CN: 估算文件和目录的磁盘使用量
description.en-US: Estimate disk usage of files and directories

description.zh-CN: 打印操作系统和硬件信息
显示当前登录用户的用户名
显示之前执行过的命令历史记录
修改文件或目录的访问权限
description.en-US: Change the access permissions of files or directories

description.zh-CN: 修改文件或目录的所有者和所属组
description.en-US: Change the owner and group of files or directories

description.zh-CN: 以 root 权限执行命令
description.en-US: Execute a command with root privileges

description.zh-CN: 管理用户级定时任务计划
显示系统内存的使用情况
显示或设置系统日期和时间
description.en-US: Display or set the system date and time

description.zh-CN: 发送 HTTP/HTTPS 网络请求
从网络下载文件，支持断点续传
description.en-US: Download files from the web with resume support

description.zh-CN: 通过加密连接登录远程服务器
description.en-US: Log in to a remote server over an encrypted connection

description.zh-CN: 通过 SSH 加密传输文件到远程主机
description.en-US: Copy files between hosts over SSH

description.zh-CN: 在本地和远程之间同步文件，只传输变化部分
description.en-US: Synchronize files locally or remotely, transferring only changes

description.zh-CN: 测试与目标主机的网络连通性
description.en-US: Test network connectivity to a target host

description.zh-CN: 追踪数据包到达目标主机的网络路径
description.en-US: Trace the network path to a target host

description.zh-CN: 查询域名的 DNS 解析信息
description.en-US: Query DNS records for a domain

description.zh-CN: 显示网络套接字连接和统计信息
description.en-US: Display network socket connections and statistics

description.zh-CN: 显示和管理网络接口、路由等配置
description.en-US: Display and manage network interfaces and routes

description.zh-CN: 将多个文件归档打包或解压
description.en-US: Archive multiple files or extract an archive

description.zh-CN: 将文件压缩为 ZIP 格式
使用 GZIP 算法压缩或解压文件
description.en-US: Compress or decompress files using GZIP algorithm

description.zh-CN: 将远程仓库完整复制到本地
description.en-US: Copy a remote repository to local

description.zh-CN: 将当前目录初始化为 Git 仓库
description.en-US: Initialize a new Git repository in the current directory

description.zh-CN: 将文件变更添加到暂存区
description.en-US: Add file changes to the staging area

description.zh-CN: 将暂存区的变更记录为一次提交
description.en-US: Record staged changes as a commit

description.zh-CN: 将本地提交推送到远程仓库
description.en-US: Push local commits to a remote repository

description.zh-CN: 从远程仓库拉取并合并变更
description.en-US: Fetch and merge changes from a remote repository

description.zh-CN: 切换到指定分支或恢复工作树文件
description.en-US: Switch to a branch or restore working tree files

description.zh-CN: 将指定分支的变更合并到当前分支
description.en-US: Merge changes from a branch into the current branch

description.zh-CN: 将当前分支的提交重放到指定分支之上
description.en-US: Reapply commits on top of another branch

description.zh-CN: 临时保存工作区的变更
显示仓库的提交历史记录
description.en-US: Display the commit history of a repository

description.zh-CN: 比较文件在不同状态之间的差异
将指定提交的变更应用到当前分支
description.en-US: Apply changes from specific commits to the current branch

description.zh-CN: 将当前分支重置到指定提交状态
description.en-US: Reset the current branch to a specified state

commands.notes: git reset --hard 会丢弃所有未提交的变更和指定提交之后的所有提交，不可恢复

description.zh-CN: 通过创建新提交来撤销指定提交的变更
description.en-US: Create a new commit that undoes the changes from a specified commit

description.zh-CN: 显示本地分支引用的更新历史
description.en-US: Show the reference log of local branch updates

description.zh-CN: 创建、列出或删除版本标签
description.en-US: Create, list, or delete version tags
